nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 反嘴鹬科
nodes.summary: 反嘴鹬科（Recurvirostridae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如斑长脚鹬、美洲反嘴鹬、Andean avocet等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 美洲反嘴鹬
nodes.summary: 美洲反嘴鹬（学名：Recurvirostra americana）为鸻形目長腳鷸科下的一个迁徙鸟种，分布于北美洲。 参考文献 外部連結
locations: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.id: loc-约翰-弗里德里希-格梅林-8a33c9ca
nodes.name: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林
nodes.summary: 约翰·弗里德里希·格梅林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、杂色穴䳍、葡萄胸鴨等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.target: loc-约翰-弗里德里希-格梅林-8a33c9ca
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Calls recorded in Palo Alto, California The American avocet (Recurvirostra americana) is a large wader in the avocet and stilt family, Recurvirostridae, found in North America

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The breeding habitat consists of marshes, beaches, prairie ponds, and shallow lakes in the mid-west, as far north as southern Canada. These breeding grounds are largely in areas just east of the rocky mountains including parts of Alberta, Saskatchewan, Montana, Idaho, Washington, Utah, North and South Dakota, Nebraska, Colorado, and even down to parts of New Mexico, Oklahoma and Texas. Their migration route lands them in almost every state in the western United States

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although the effects are highly contested, these increased concentrations have potential negative effects on American avocet breeding success, especially because Avocet chicks are more susceptible to environmental disruptions than adults. The avocet also faces habitat loss
